title: Toggle HDR
shortDescription: Toggle HDR on/off for a single display at a time.
description:
Enables you to toggle Windows HDR for one of the displays attached to your machine at a time. Primarily avoiding the global Windows shortcut Win + Alt + B, which toggles HDR for all monitors at once.

It was written to solve the problem of wanting to enable HDR for a game on a main display, while not having blown-out HDR elements displaying on other displays running other applications.
